Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a client company for which marketing plans are generated. Stores fundamental business information.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this company's data.

name.description: The official name of the company.

industry.description: The industry or sector in which the company operates.

location.description: The primary geographical location of the company.

size.description: The size of the company, e.g., 'Small (1-50 employees)', 'Medium (51-250 employees)', 'Large (250+ employees)'.

budget.description: The marketing budget allocated for the company, typically in currency.

objectives.description: A description of the company's core business objectives.

description.description: A detailed description of the company's business, products, or services.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product or service offered by a company.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this product belongs to.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

name.description: The name of the product or service.

description.description: A detailed description of the product or service.

price.description: The price of the product or service.

targetAudience.description: A description of the target audience for this product.

NicheAnalysis.title: NicheAnalysis
NicheAnalysis.description: Stores the results of the market niche and competition analysis for a specific company.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this analysis belongs to.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

nicheDefinition.description: A detailed definition and description of the target market niche.

analysisDate.description: The date when the niche analysis was performed.

Competitor.title: Competitor
Competitor.description: Represents a competitor identified within a niche analysis.

nicheAnalysisId.description: Reference to the NicheAnalysis this competitor is part of.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

name.description: The name of the competing company or product.

pricingModel.description: Description of the competitor's pricing strategy or model.

channel.description: The primary marketing or distribution channel used by the competitor.

strengths.description: A description of the competitor's key strengths.

weaknesses.description: A description of the competitor's key weaknesses.

IdealCustomerProfile.title: IdealCustomerProfile
IdealCustomerProfile.description: Defines a detailed buyer persona or ideal customer for a company.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this ideal customer profile belongs to.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

personaName.description: A name for the buyer persona (e.g., 'Marketing Manager María').

ageRange.description: The typical age range of the ideal customer.

occupation.description: The typical occupation or role of the ideal customer.

demographics.description: Additional demographic information about the ideal customer.

psychographics.description: Information about the ideal customer's interests, values, and lifestyle.

needs.description: A description of the ideal customer's core needs and desires.

objections.description: Common objections or concerns the ideal customer might have.

preferredChannels.description: The preferred communication and marketing channels for the ideal customer.

goals.description: The personal or professional goals of the ideal customer.

painPoints.description: The problems or challenges the ideal customer faces.

MarketingPlan.title: MarketingPlan
MarketingPlan.description: Represents a generated strategic marketing plan for a company.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this marketing plan is for.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

title.description: The title or name of the marketing plan.

generatedDate.description: The date when the marketing plan was generated.

description.description: A high-level summary or description of the marketing plan.

status.description: The current status of the marketing plan (e.g., 'Draft', 'Approved', 'Active', 'Archived').

MarketingTask.title: MarketingTask
MarketingTask.description: Represents an individual action or task within a marketing plan.

marketingPlanId.description: Reference to the MarketingPlan this task belongs to.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

action.description: A description of the specific marketing action or task.

channel.description: The marketing channel through which this action will be executed (e.g., 'Social Media', 'Email', 'SEM').

responsible.description: The person or team responsible for executing this task.

budget.description: The estimated budget allocated for this specific task.

expectedKpi.description: The expected Key Performance Indicator (KPI) or outcome for this task.

status.description: The current status of the task (e.g., 'Pending', 'In Progress', 'Completed', 'Delayed').

startDate.description: The planned start date for the task.

endDate.description: The planned end date for the task.

TrackspotMetric.title: TrackspotMetric
TrackspotMetric.description: Stores key performance indicators (KPIs) and metrics for tracking marketing plan performance.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company for which this metric is recorded.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

marketingPlanId.description: Optional reference to a specific MarketingPlan if the metric is plan-specific.

metricType.description: The type of metric being tracked (e.g., 'Leads', 'Conversions', 'ROI Estimado', 'Website Traffic').

value.description: The numerical value of the metric.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., 'count', '%', 'USD', 'EUR').

recordedAt.description: The date and time when the metric was recorded or updated.

period.description: The time period to which the metric applies (e.g., 'Daily', 'Weekly', 'Monthly', 'Q1 2024').

AICreativeOutput.title: AICreativeOutput
AICreativeOutput.description: Stores creative content generated by AI tools, such as slogans, newsletter ideas, or brochure concepts.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company for which this creative output was generated.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

inputPrompt.description: The prompt or input text provided to the AI to generate this content.

generatedContent.description: The actual content generated by the AI.

generatedAt.description: The date and time when the content was generated.

EmailSequence.title: EmailSequence
EmailSequence.description: Represents an automated sequence of emails for marketing campaigns.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this sequence belongs to.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

name.description: The name of the email sequence.

description.description: A short description of the sequence's purpose.

createdAt.description: The date when the sequence was created.

Email.title: Email
Email.description: Represents a single email within an email sequence.

emailSequenceId.description: Reference to the EmailSequence this email is part of.

subject.description: The subject line of the email.

body.description: The HTML or plain text body of the email.

delayDays.description: Number of days to wait before sending this email after the previous one in the sequence.

order.description: The order of this email in the sequence.

Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a potential customer or lead.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this lead belongs to.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

email.description: The email address of the lead.

status.description: The current status of the lead.

lastContact.description: The date of the last contact with the lead.

createdAt.description: The date when the lead was created.

AutomationRule.title: AutomationRule
AutomationRule.description: Represents a rule for automating marketing tasks.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this rule belongs to.

userId.description: Denormalized reference to the User who owns the company.

name.description: The name of the automation rule.

trigger.description: The trigger that initiates the action (e.g., 'New lead added').

action.description: The action to be performed (e.g., 'Send welcome email').

createdAt.description: The date when the rule was created.

structure.description: Stores details about a client company. Each document is owned by a specific user.
Stores details about a company's products or services.
Stores the market niche analysis for a specific company.
Stores details about a competitor within a specific niche analysis.
Stores buyer persona details for a specific company.
Stores a strategic marketing plan for a specific company.
Stores individual tasks within a marketing plan.
Stores KPI metrics for a specific company, optionally linked to a marketing plan.
Stores AI-generated creative content for a specific company.
Stores automated email sequences for a company.
Stores individual emails within a sequence.
Stores automation rules for a company.
